invite.subtitle: You have been invited as a {role}. Set a password to activate your account.

errors.missingParams: Invalid invitation link. Token or email is missing.
errors.notFound: Invitation link not found or has been removed.
errors.revoked: This invitation has been revoked by an administrator.
errors.alreadyUsed: This invitation has already been used. Please sign in or contact an administrator.
errors.expired: This invitation has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

invite.invalidContact: If you need assistance, please contact a system administrator.
